---
description: "Use when writing or editing documentation, README files, setup guides, usage notes, verification steps, or developer-facing docs. Covers documentation scope and content."
name: "Documentation Standards"
---

# Documentation Standards

- Keep documentation concise and task-relevant.
- Include assumptions when they affect correct usage or interpretation.
- Include setup steps when the task requires environment or dependency preparation.
- Include usage guidance when the user needs to run, operate, or extend the result.
- Include verification steps when the user needs a concrete way to confirm the outcome.
- Avoid time or cost estimates unless the user explicitly requests them.
